query:
SELECT cb.text
           FROM content_blocks cb
           JOIN toc_nodes tn ON tn.id = cb.node_id
           JOIN books b ON b.id = tn.book_id
           WHERE b.slug = $1 AND tn.slug = $2 AND cb.text <> ''
             AND cb.block_type NOT IN ('heading', 'separator')
           ORDER BY cb.position
           LIMIT 3
